ip_outcome_note: Verified as a depiction of Nicol Bolas's statue being toppled during the climax of the War of the Spark storyline. Scryfall flags the card with story_spotlight: true and the flavor text explicitly names Bolas. The Wizards/MTG-Wiki narrative beat: Nissa animates Vitu-Ghazi, which then topples the Bolas statue on Ravnica, briefly rallying the defenders before the God-Eternals turn the tide. Bolas is an internal MTG character, not an external IP; ip_verified: true is recorded but no external-IP warning callout is required.

trivia_bullets.text: Story-spotlight card in War of the Spark (Act 2 of the set's narrative arc), commemorating the moment Nissa animates Vitu-Ghazi and the colossal tree topples Bolas's statue on Ravnica — a brief rally before the God-Eternals enter the fray and turn the tide [Scryfall story_spotlight: true; MTG Wiki: War of the Spark / Vitu-Ghazi].
sources: MTG Wiki: War of the Spark

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "Bolas cared little when his statue fell, thinking it a useful distraction, underestimating the surge of resolve it gave his opponents." — narratorial, not attributed to a character; frames the toppling as a morale beat Bolas tactically dismissed [Scryfall flavor_text].

Art by Sidharth Chaturvedi. Common in the original WAR printing; reprinted at uncommon in Double Masters (2XM, 2020) with the same art and flavor text, though only the WAR printing retains the story_spotlight flag [Scryfall prints index].

Three-mana white instant: tap any permanent, destroy it if it's an artifact, then draw a card. Format-legal in Modern, Pioneer, Pauper, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander; format-staple status is low (EDHREC rank ~20,132) but the cantrip-tap-or-blow-up flexibility keeps it in Pauper and budget-EDH conversations [Scryfall legalities, EDHREC].

Part of the Bolas-Falls narrative cluster within WAR: pairs directly with Awakening of Vitu-Ghazi (the animation cause) and sits in the broader Act 2 / Act 3 arc that includes Despark and The Elderspell. The Act 2 story-spotlight cycle is: Pledge of Unity, Rally of Wings, Awakening of Vitu-Ghazi, Topple the Statue, Enter the God-Eternals, Spark Harvest, The Elderspell, Deliver Unto Evil [MTG Wiki: Story Spotlight; epicstream WAR Act 2 spotlight coverage].

related_cards.name: Awakening of Vitu-Ghazi
related_cards.note: Direct narrative cause: Nissa animates Vitu-Ghazi, which then topples the Bolas statue depicted here. Same Act 2 story-spotlight cycle.

related_cards.name: Despark
related_cards.note: Already-verified Bolas-Falls cluster member; Act 3 story-spotlight, same set, same Bolas-defeat narrative beat.

related_cards.name: The Elderspell
related_cards.note: The macguffin spell at the center of WAR's plot — Bolas's planeswalker-harvest mechanism, the thing the toppling resists. Act 2 story-spotlight.

related_cards.name: Enter the God-Eternals
related_cards.note: The very next narrative beat after Topple: Bolas's response, when the God-Eternals step through the portal and destroy Vitu-Ghazi. Act 2 story-spotlight.

related_cards.name: God-Pharaoh's Statue
related_cards.note: Sibling statue card in the same set — Bolas's earlier monumentalization on Amonkhet — frames the iconography of the toppling here.
